title.zh: 我要把一个方向的文献变成可靠证据，而不是只攒 PDF
title.en: I need to turn literature into evidence, not just collect PDFs

description.zh: 从检索、全文精读、引用核验到证据表，把论文、预印本和 PDF 变成可写、可复查的研究判断。
description.en: Move from search, full-text reading, and citation checks to evidence tables that support research judgment.

targetUsers.zh: 刚进入新领域的研究者
做综述或开题的人
需要核验引用的作者
课题组 RA

inputMaterials.zh: 种子论文或 PDF 文件夹
inputMaterials.en: Seed papers or a PDF folder

inputMaterials.zh: 目标数据库或期刊范围

step.zh: 检索并去重第一批论文
step.en: Search and deduplicate the first paper pool

prompt.zh: 用 paper-lookup 围绕这个研究问题检索 PubMed、arXiv、OpenAlex、Semantic Scholar 和 Crossref，去重后按证据类型、年份和开放获取状态分组。
prompt.en: Use paper-lookup to search PubMed, arXiv, OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, and Crossref for this question. Deduplicate and group by evidence type, year, and open-access status.

step.en: Read full text into an evidence table

prompt.zh: 用 nature-reader 精读这些 PDF/DOI，保留图表位置、关键实验、样本量、方法限制和可引用原文锚点，输出中英双语证据表。
prompt.en: Use nature-reader to read these PDFs/DOIs with figure/table placement, key experiments, sample sizes, limitations, and source anchors. Output a bilingual evidence table.

prompt.zh: 用 literature-review 把证据表综合成 5-8 条可写论断，标注支持强度、反例、争议点和需要补检索的空白。
prompt.en: Use literature-review to synthesize the evidence table into 5-8 writable claims with strength, counterexamples, debates, and remaining search gaps.

title.zh: 我要把想法变成可执行研究设计，并提前算清风险
title.en: I need to turn an idea into an executable study design and quantify risk

description.zh: 在采集数据前明确假设、变量、随机化、样本量、统计检验和报告口径，避免做到最后才发现设计站不住。
description.en: Clarify hypotheses, variables, randomization, power, statistical tests, and reporting before data collection.

targetUsers.zh: 准备开题或预注册的人
要做实验/问卷/临床分析的人
需要 IRB 或基金论证的人

inputMaterials.zh: 效应量预期或先导结果
inputMaterials.en: Expected effect sizes or pilot results

step.zh: 把兴趣收束为可检验问题

prompt.zh: 基于这些笔记生成 3 个可检验研究问题；每个问题列出变量、机制、边界条件、可用数据和最小可行研究设计。
prompt.en: Generate three testable research questions from these notes. For each, list variables, mechanism, boundaries, available data, and the minimum viable design.

prompt.zh: 用 experimental-design 为首选问题设计研究方案，说明对照、随机化/匹配、区组、混杂控制、采样规则和失败风险。
prompt.en: Use experimental-design to design the study, covering controls, randomization/matching, blocking, confounding control, sampling rules, and failure risks.

step.zh: 估算样本量和统计口径

prompt.zh: 用 statistical-power 根据目标效应和可用资源计算样本量、功效曲线和最小可检测效应，并给出统计报告模板。
prompt.en: Use statistical-power to calculate sample size, power curves, and minimum detectable effects, then provide a statistical reporting template.

title.zh: 我拿到数据了，需要从探索、清洗到可复现分析
title.en: I have data and need reproducible analysis from exploration to results

description.zh: 面向表格、科学文件、时间序列和大数据，把探索性分析、清洗、建模、统计解释和可复现执行串起来。
description.en: Connect exploratory analysis, cleaning, modeling, statistical interpretation, and reproducible execution across tabular and scientific data.

targetUsers.zh: 有原始数据但流程未定的研究者
targetUsers.en: Researchers with raw data and no settled pipeline

targetUsers.zh: 需要复现旧分析的人
处理较大数据集的团队

inputMaterials.en: CSV, Excel, HDF5, image, or scientific data files

step.zh: 先读懂数据形状和质量

prompt.zh: 用 exploratory-data-analysis 检查这些数据文件的格式、字段、缺失、异常值、重复、单位和可疑批次，并给出下游分析建议。
prompt.en: Use exploratory-data-analysis to inspect file formats, fields, missingness, outliers, duplicates, units, suspicious batches, and downstream analysis options.

prompt.zh: 用 polars 把清洗、类型转换、聚合、连接和派生变量写成可复现脚本；如果数据超过内存，说明何时切换到 dask。
prompt.en: Use polars to script cleaning, type conversion, aggregation, joins, and derived variables. Explain when to switch to dask if data exceeds memory.

step.zh: 输出统计结论和图表草案
step.en: Produce statistical findings and draft figures

prompt.zh: 用 statistical-analysis 选择合适检验/模型，检查假设，输出结果解释、效应量、置信区间和可视化建议。
prompt.en: Use statistical-analysis to choose tests/models, check assumptions, and output interpretations, effect sizes, confidence intervals, and visualization suggestions.

title.zh: 我要做 AI/机器学习科研实验，而不是只跑一个 demo
title.en: I need to run AI/ML research experiments, not just a demo

description.zh: 覆盖科学数据集发现、深度学习训练、GPU 加速、基准迭代和结果记录，适合 AI4Science、LLM、ML 论文和工程型研究。
description.en: Discover scientific datasets, train models, optimize GPU workloads, iterate benchmarks, and record results for AI4Science, LLM, ML, and systems research.

targetUsers.zh: AI4Science 研究者
训练或微调模型的学生
做 benchmark 或消融实验的人

step.zh: 找到可用数据集和模型基线

prompt.zh: 用 hugging-science 为这个科学 ML 任务查找合适的数据集、预训练模型、演示空间和基线论文，说明许可、输入输出和复现实用性。
prompt.en: Use hugging-science to find datasets, pretrained models, spaces, and baseline papers for this scientific ML task, with licensing, I/O, and reproducibility notes.

step.zh: 整理训练循环和实验配置

prompt.zh: 用 pytorch-lightning 把现有训练代码整理成可配置、可记录、可扩展到多 GPU 的实验框架，并列出必要回调和日志字段。
prompt.en: Use pytorch-lightning to organize the training code into a configurable, logged, multi-GPU-ready experiment framework with required callbacks and log fields.

step.zh: 迭代提升指标但控制过拟合

prompt.zh: 用 arbor 规划多轮实验搜索：假设树、每轮候选改动、开发集/测试集隔离、停止规则和结果复盘表。
prompt.en: Use arbor to plan iterative experiment search: hypothesis tree, candidate changes, dev/test isolation, stopping rules, and result review table.

title.zh: 我要分析组学、细胞或临床生物医学数据
title.en: I need to analyze omics, cellular, or biomedical data

description.zh: 覆盖单细胞、bulk RNA-seq、通路富集、医学影像/临床记录和公共生物数据库查询，把领域工具链接到可发表结果。
description.en: Cover single-cell, bulk RNA-seq, pathway enrichment, biomedical records, and public biological databases, connecting domain tooling to publishable results.

targetUsers.zh: 湿实验和干实验交叉团队
单细胞或转录组研究者
临床/生物医学数据分析者

inputMaterials.en: FASTQ, counts, h5ad, or gene lists

prompt.zh: 用 scanpy 检查 h5ad/counts 数据，完成 QC、归一化、降维、聚类和 marker 探索，并说明何时需要 scvi-tools 做批次校正。
prompt.en: Use scanpy to inspect h5ad/counts data, run QC, normalization, dimensionality reduction, clustering, and marker exploration. Explain when scvi-tools is needed for batch correction.

step.zh: 从 reads 到差异表达
step.en: Go from reads to differential expression

prompt.zh: 用 bulk-rnaseq 为这些 FASTQ/counts 设计从质控、比对/定量到差异表达的可复现流程，并标出关键 QC 阈值。
prompt.en: Use bulk-rnaseq to design a reproducible path from QC and alignment/quantification to differential expression, with key QC thresholds.

step.zh: 解释通路和生物学意义

prompt.zh: 用 pathway-enrichment 对差异基因或 marker 做 ORA/GSEA，解释通路、背景集、多重校正和可发表图表。
prompt.en: Use pathway-enrichment for ORA/GSEA on DE genes or markers, explaining pathways, background sets, multiple testing, and publishable figures.

title.zh: 我要做蛋白、分子、药物或材料方向的计算研究
title.en: I need computational work for proteins, molecules, drugs, or materials

description.zh: 把结构预测、分子描述符、对接、药物发现和材料科学工具组织成能筛选、建模、解释和汇报的流程。
description.en: Organize structure prediction, molecular descriptors, docking, drug discovery, and materials tools into screening, modeling, interpretation, and reporting workflows.

targetUsers.zh: 药物发现和化学生物学研究者
targetUsers.en: Drug discovery and chemical biology researchers

targetUsers.zh: 蛋白设计团队
材料计算研究者

inputMaterials.en: Protein sequences, PDB, SMILES, SDF, or CIF

prompt.zh: 用 rdkit/datamol 清洗 SMILES/SDF，生成描述符、指纹、构象和相似性矩阵，并标记不可用输入。
prompt.en: Use rdkit/datamol to clean SMILES/SDF, generate descriptors, fingerprints, conformers, and similarity matrices, and flag invalid inputs.

prompt.zh: 用 diffdock/boltz 为候选蛋白-配体组合预测结合姿势或复合体结构，输出置信度、失败案例和后续验证建议。
prompt.en: Use diffdock/boltz to predict binding poses or complex structures for candidate protein-ligand pairs, with confidence, failures, and validation suggestions.

step.zh: 扩展到材料或性质分析
step.en: Extend to material or property analysis

prompt.zh: 如果对象是材料结构，用 pymatgen 读取 CIF/POSCAR，计算基础结构信息、相图/能带相关输入和 Materials Project 查询计划。
prompt.en: If the target is a material structure, use pymatgen to read CIF/POSCAR, compute structural information, and plan phase diagram, band-structure, or Materials Project queries.

title.zh: 我要处理地理空间、天文、物理或工程科学数据
title.en: I need to process geospatial, astronomy, physics, or engineering data

description.zh: 面向遥感/GIS、天文 FITS、量子/物理模拟和工程优化等非生命科学数据，让场景不只停留在论文写作。
description.en: Handle remote sensing/GIS, astronomy FITS, quantum or physical simulation, and engineering optimization beyond writing-centric workflows.

targetUsers.zh: 地球科学和遥感研究者
targetUsers.en: Earth science and remote sensing researchers

targetUsers.zh: 天文/物理数据分析者
工程仿真和优化团队

inputMaterials.zh: 栅格、矢量、FITS、观测或仿真文件
inputMaterials.en: Raster, vector, FITS, observation, or simulation files

step.zh: 建立空间或观测数据底图
step.en: Build the spatial or observational base layer

prompt.zh: 用 geomaster/geopandas 读取这些空间数据，检查坐标系、裁剪研究区、生成质量报告和第一张探索地图。
prompt.en: Use geomaster/geopandas to read spatial data, check CRS, clip the study area, generate a quality report, and create the first exploratory map.

prompt.zh: 如果数据是 FITS/天文观测，用 astropy 处理单位、坐标、WCS、表格和时间系统，并输出可复现 notebook 结构。
prompt.en: If the data is FITS or astronomy observations, use astropy for units, coordinates, WCS, tables, and time systems, then output a reproducible notebook outline.

prompt.zh: 如果任务涉及工程设计或参数寻优，用 pymoo 设计目标函数、约束、Pareto 前沿和结果解释模板。
prompt.en: If the task involves engineering design or parameter optimization, use pymoo to define objectives, constraints, Pareto fronts, and an interpretation template.

title.zh: 我要把实验方案、记录和自动化平台接起来
title.en: I need to connect protocols, records, and lab automation platforms

description.zh: 把 protocols.io、Benchling、Opentrons、Pylabrobot 和实验日志纳入同一个科研执行链，减少手工搬运和不可追溯。
description.en: Connect protocols.io, Benchling, Opentrons, Pylabrobot, and experiment logs into one traceable execution chain.

targetUsers.zh: 湿实验课题组
自动化平台使用者
需要规范实验记录的人

inputMaterials.en: Sample, reagent, or plate layout information

inputMaterials.zh: 仪器平台或 API 凭据说明

step.zh: 整理 protocol 和材料表

prompt.zh: 用 protocolsio-integration 把现有 SOP 拆成步骤、材料、参数、注意事项和版本记录，并标出需要人工确认的地方。
prompt.en: Use protocolsio-integration to split the SOP into steps, materials, parameters, cautions, and version history, flagging fields that need human confirmation.

prompt.zh: 用 benchling-integration 设计实体、库存、ELN 条目和查询字段的映射，让实验结果能回流到项目记录。
prompt.en: Use benchling-integration to design mappings for entities, inventory, ELN entries, and query fields so results flow back into project records.

prompt.zh: 用 opentrons-integration 或 pylabrobot 将关键步骤转为机器人协议草案，输出板位、移液动作、校验点和模拟运行清单。
prompt.en: Use opentrons-integration or pylabrobot to turn key steps into a robot protocol draft with deck layout, liquid transfers, checkpoints, and simulation checklist.

title.zh: 我要把本地、集群或云 GPU 变成可复用科研工作台
title.en: I need local, cluster, or cloud GPU resources as a reusable research workbench

description.zh: 在本机、SSH/Slurm、Modal、云 GPU 和模型端点之间选择执行环境，记录依赖、资源、成本和可回收状态。
description.en: Choose execution environments across local machines, SSH/Slurm, Modal, cloud GPUs, and model endpoints while tracking dependencies, resources, cost, and cleanup.

targetUsers.zh: 跑大模型或大数据分析的人
targetUsers.en: Researchers running large models or data jobs

targetUsers.zh: 课题组工程负责人
需要复现实验环境的人

prompt.zh: 用 optimize-for-gpu 检查当前 Python/NumPy/pandas/ML 管线哪里适合 GPU 或并行化，并给出 CPU/GPU/集群取舍。
prompt.en: Use optimize-for-gpu to identify where the current Python/NumPy/pandas/ML pipeline benefits from GPU or parallelism, with CPU/GPU/cluster tradeoffs.

prompt.zh: 用 nextflow 为多步骤分析或 nf-core 流程设计 samplesheet、nextflow.config、容器/conda 环境和 -resume 运行策略。
prompt.en: Use nextflow to design samplesheets, nextflow.config, container/conda environments, and -resume strategy for a multi-step analysis or nf-core workflow.

step.zh: 注册远程环境或模型端点
step.en: Register remote environments or model endpoints

prompt.zh: 用 compute-env-setup 规划 SSH/Slurm/Modal/模型端点的注册方式、启动/停止脚本、权重缓存、日志和清理流程。
prompt.en: Use compute-env-setup to plan SSH/Slurm/Modal/model-endpoint registration, start/stop scripts, weight caches, logs, and cleanup workflow.

title.zh: 我要把结果写成论文、投稿，并准备回应审稿人
title.en: I need to write, submit, and respond to reviewers

description.zh: 从论证结构、英文润色、引用与数据可用性，到投稿前预审和逐点回复，覆盖论文走向发表的后半程。
description.en: Cover the publication half of the journey: argument structure, English polish, citation and data availability, pre-submission review, and point-by-point responses.

targetUsers.zh: 正在写 manuscript 的作者
准备高影响力期刊投稿的人
收到审稿意见的团队

inputMaterials.zh: 参考文献和数据仓库信息

prompt.zh: 用 nature-writing 基于 claims、结果和图表重建论文主线，明确摘要、引言、结果叙事和讨论各段承担的论证任务。
prompt.en: Use nature-writing to rebuild the manuscript argument from claims, results, and figures, assigning argumentative jobs to abstract, introduction, results, and discussion sections.

prompt.zh: 用 nature-polishing 润色目标段落，保留事实边界，提升学术英语表达，并列出可能被 reviewer 攻击的夸张或证据不足之处。
prompt.en: Use nature-polishing to polish target sections while preserving factual boundaries, improving academic English, and listing claims that may be overstated or under-supported.

prompt.zh: 用 nature-reviewer 做投稿前预审，输出 3 份 reviewer report 和综合整改表；若已有意见，再用 nature-response 起草逐点回复。
prompt.en: Use nature-reviewer for pre-submission review with three reviewer reports and a revision table; if comments already exist, use nature-response to draft point-by-point replies.

title.zh: 我要把结果做成图、机制示意图、幻灯片或会议海报
title.en: I need figures, mechanism schematics, slides, or conference posters

description.zh: 不只是画图，而是把结论、证据、版式、期刊格式和演讲叙事统一到可交付的科研视觉材料里。
description.en: Unify claims, evidence, layout, venue formats, and talk narrative into deliverable research visuals.

targetUsers.zh: 准备论文图组的人
做组会/答辩/会议汇报的人
targetUsers.en: Group meeting, defense, or conference presenters

targetUsers.zh: 需要机制图或海报的人

inputMaterials.en: Data tables, images, or existing figures
The claim each figure must prove

step.en: Define what the figure must prove

prompt.zh: 用 figure-composer 从一句话结论和数据来源反推多面板图大纲，列出每个 panel 的证据功能、标签预算和失败风险。
prompt.en: Use figure-composer to derive a multi-panel outline from the claim and data sources, listing each panel's evidence job, label budget, and failure risks.

prompt.zh: 用 scientific-visualization 根据数据和目标期刊生成多面板图，包含色盲友好配色、误差线、显著性标注、PDF/SVG/TIFF 导出和渲染后 QA。
prompt.en: Use scientific-visualization to generate multi-panel plots with colorblind-safe palettes, error bars, significance markers, PDF/SVG/TIFF export, and post-render QA.

step.en: Turn results into a talk or poster

prompt.zh: 用 scientific-slides 或 latex-posters 把论文主线转成组会/会议幻灯片或海报，控制叙事节奏、图表选择和版式可读性。
prompt.en: Use scientific-slides or latex-posters to turn the manuscript narrative into slides or a poster, controlling pacing, figure selection, and layout readability.

title.zh: 我想把课题组反复做的事沉淀成自己的科研 Agent
title.en: I want to turn repeated lab work into my own research agent

description.zh: 从观察重复流程、组合已有 skill、编写新 skill、记录项目记忆，到形成可交给新人和团队复用的 agent 工作台。
description.en: Observe repeated workflows, compose existing skills, write new skills, record project memory, and build reusable agents for the team.

targetUsers.zh: 课题组负责人
希望自动化重复流程的研究者
管理多个项目的 RA/工程同学
targetUsers.en: RAs or engineers managing multiple projects

inputMaterials.zh: 一段重复工作流程描述
希望调用的工具和数据边界

prompt.zh: 用 autoskill 或人工梳理最近 5 次类似任务，归纳触发条件、输入材料、判断规则、交付物和现有 skill 覆盖情况。
prompt.en: Use autoskill or manual review to summarize the last five similar tasks: triggers, inputs, judgment rules, deliverables, and existing skill coverage.

prompt.zh: 用 skill-creator 把缺口写成新的 SKILL.md，或把多个现有 skill 编排成组合 recipe，并加入测试样例。
prompt.en: Use skill-creator to write a new SKILL.md for gaps, or compose multiple existing skills into a recipe with test examples.

step.zh: 沉淀项目记忆和交接方式

prompt.zh: 用 research-manager 在每次会话结束时记录决策、实验、失败路径和关键证据，形成新人可接手的项目脉络。
prompt.en: Use research-manager at session close to record decisions, experiments, failed paths, and key evidence so new teammates can pick up the project context.

description.zh: 把想法、文献、研究设计和数据分析串成可复查的科研判断。
description.en: Turn ideas, literature, study design, and analysis into reviewable research judgment.

description.zh: 覆盖 AI/ML 实验、生命科学、蛋白分子材料、地理空间和物理科学等高频科研计算场景。
description.en: Cover AI/ML experiments, life science, proteins and molecules, materials, geospatial, and physical science workflows.

title.zh: 实验、算力与可复用工作流

description.zh: 把实验平台、远程算力、模型端点和课题组重复流程沉淀成可执行、可交接的工作台。
description.en: Turn lab platforms, remote compute, model endpoints, and repeated team workflows into executable, handoff-ready workbenches.

description.zh: 把结果推进到论文、审稿回复、数据可用性声明、图组、幻灯片和会议海报。
description.en: Move results into manuscripts, reviewer responses, data availability statements, figure panels, slides, and posters.
